steps.title: Identify the target claim
steps.content: The claim specifies what must be illustrated: remote and solitary—meaning isolated from people and buildings.

steps.title: Apply to the choices
steps.content:
Choice A directly shows this: Dorothy at the doorway seeing “nothing but the great gray prairie” with “not a tree nor a house” visible—a concrete image of complete isolation.

Choice B addresses the house's weathered appearance, not its remoteness; Choice C is set in Oz and focuses on emotional memory; Choice D is set in Oz and describes its lush beauty—none show Kansas's isolation.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
